label: ROAS Pak
blurb: Media Buying, AdTech & E-commerce Growth. Customer Acquisition Cost (CAC) reduction and ad budget efficiency.

skills.label: Utm Tracking Auditor
skills.method: Scans all live ad URLs to ensure UTM parameters (source, medium, campaign) are perfectly formatted before the ad goes live.
trigger_examples: saves analytics tracking from human typos

skills.label: Search Term Exclusion Scrubber
skills.method: Scans broad-match search terms daily; auto-adds negative keywords (like "free" or "jobs") that are bleeding ad spend.

skills.label: Roas Bid Modifier
skills.method: Connects Shopify LTV (Life Time Value) data to Google Ads; automatically lowers bids on keywords that drive cheap clicks but high return/refund rates.
trigger_examples: stops brands from buying unprofitable revenue

skills.label: Ad Fatigue Creative Swapper
skills.method: Detects when an ad's Click-Through Rate (CTR) drops by 20% over 3 days, automatically pausing it and swapping in a fresh creative asset.

skills.label: Cross Channel Budget Shifter
skills.method: Analyzes real-time CPA (Cost Per Acquisition); automatically shifts $10k from a failing TikTok campaign to a winning Pinterest campaign on a Saturday night.

skills.label: Meta Catalog Rejection Fixer
skills.method: Identifies products suspended by Facebook for "policy violations," rewrites the XML feed description to remove flagged trigger words, and resubmits.

skills.label: Ltv To Cac Cohort Analyzer
skills.method: Groups customers by the month they were acquired, tracking how much they spend over 12 months vs. what it cost to acquire them.
trigger_examples: the most important metric for dtc (direct-to-consumer) brands

skills.label: Affiliate Fraud Click Detector
skills.method: Analyzes referral IP addresses and conversion time-stamps; flags affiliates using botnets to steal commission payouts.

skills.label: Google Merchant Suspension Appealer
skills.method: Audits website for missing GTINs or shipping policies, fixes the data feed, and submits the exact required appeal to Google.
